title: Job Opening Category Manager at Adidas India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Adidas India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adidas India Ventures Solutions:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India Ventures Solutions!
